response.step_by_step_log: Video analyzed for musical content. Two songs identified: '1日ヒーロー' by HoneyWorks and 'オトノケ' by Creepy Nuts. Lyrics searched using primary template. Scene breakdown created based on song segments. 'オトノケ' scene timestamp noted, though full lyric mapping omitted for brevity as per instructions.
response.global_summary: The video features two musical performances by Hololive talents Takanashi Kiara and Mori Calliope (often joined by Shiori Novella). The first song is "1日ヒーロー" (1 Day Hero), and the second is a cover of the anime Dandadan opening theme "オトノケ" (Otonoke).

scenes.description: Takanashi Kiara and Mori Calliope perform '1日ヒーロー'. On-screen text indicates lyrics/arrangement by HoneyWorks and MARUMOCHI.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
チェックワンツー! チェックワンツー! Yeah!
あーあもう無理!文化祭
言葉にダンスに...キャパオーバーです
心配無用のまじない
きっと報われるその努力
笑顔になあれ。
ドキドキしてる
ありえないくらい本気だし
魔法、かかる、今日限りヒーロータイム
何とぞね
Let's go!
baby kiss 照れないで
気持ち伝えてよ!
(好き! 好き!)
相思相愛 好き!
メイク崩れても
髪が乱れても
(好き! 好き!)
絶対忘れない 青春の1ページ!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Check 1, 2! Check 1, 2! Yeah!
Ah, I can't take it anymore! The school festival
Words and dances... it's all over the capacity
Don't worry, it's a charm without use
Surely you will be rewarded, that effort
Become a smile.
Heart-pounding,
It's serious, it's impossible.
Magic, it's starting, it's only today, Hero Time
Anything, please.
Let's go!
Baby kiss, don't be shy
Convey your feelings!
(Like! Like!)
Mutual love, like!
Even if the makeup crumbles
Even if my hair is messy
(Like! Like!)
Never forget, one page of our youth!
